mapper.select: SELECT A.id AS line_material_id , B.id AS production_line_id , B.line_name AS production_line_name , B.status AS production_line_status , B.daily_capacity AS daily_capacity FROM line_material A INNER JOIN production_line B ON A.line_id = B.id INNER JOIN material C ON A.material_id = C.id WHERE C.material_code = #{materialCode} LIMIT 1
